goal: partial[Real](f, b) - partial[Real](f, a) = sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](a.until(b), f))

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 + k0 = x1 } = x0 <= x1 }(a, a + k)
not a <= a + k or exists(k0: Nat) { a + k0 = a + k }
not exists(k0: Nat) { a + k0 = a + k } or a <= a + k
(forall(x0: Nat) { a + k != a + x0 or a <= a + k })

goal: partial[Real](tail[Real](f, a), k) = partial[Real](f, a + k) - partial[Real](f, a)
partial[Real](tail[Real](f, a), k) + partial[Real](f, a) = partial[Real](f, a) + partial[Real](tail[Real](f, a), k)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(partial[Real](tail[Real](f, a), k), partial[Real](f, a))
